channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: People exposed to smoke spreading from Canadian wildfires ar…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: People exposed to smoke spreading from Canadian wildfires are at risk of a wide range of health problems. Here's how to know when the air is dangerous based on the quality index, plus some tips for staying safe. nyti.ms/4aSLV1Q
item.content:encoded: People exposed to smoke spreading from Canadian wildfires are at risk of a wide range of health problems. Here's how to know when the air is dangerous based on the quality index, plus some tips for staying safe. nyti.ms/4aSLV1Q

item.title: Claudia Winkleman quits her chatshow after seven episodes
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: Claudia Winkleman quits her chatshow after seven episodes
item.content:encoded: Claudia Winkleman quits her chatshow after seven episodes

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA president Gianni Infan…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA president Gianni Infantino just oversaw one of the biggest controversies in World Cup history. So why is he more powerful and secure than ever? "Everyone is thinking and talking about Infantino, but nobody ever does anything."
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA president Gianni Infantino just oversaw one of the biggest controversies in World Cup history. So why is he more powerful and secure than ever? "Everyone is thinking and talking about Infantino, but nobody ever does anything."

item.title: Ebola patients, responders flee attack on Congo hospital reu…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Ebola patients, responders flee attack on Congo hospital reut.rs/4fhydqr
item.content:encoded: Ebola patients, responders flee attack on Congo hospital reut.rs/4fhydqr

item.title: #🔖世の中 鈴木エイト氏の逆転勝訴確定 信者への名誉毀損認めず、上告棄却 | 毎日新聞 最高裁第3小法廷（渡辺恵理子…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
鈴木エイト氏の逆転勝訴確定　信者への名誉毀損認めず、上告棄却 | 毎日新聞

最高裁第3小法廷（渡辺恵理子裁判長）は、世界平和統一家庭連合（旧統一教会）の信者が、ジャーナリストの鈴木エイトさんに名誉を毀損されたとして損害賠償を求めた訴訟で、信者側の上告を退ける決定をした。15日付。鈴木さんに11万円の支払いを命じた一審判決を取り消し、信者側の請求を棄却した二審東京高裁判決が確定...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
鈴木エイト氏の逆転勝訴確定　信者への名誉毀損認めず、上告棄却 | 毎日新聞

最高裁第3小法廷（渡辺恵理子裁判長）は、世界平和統一家庭連合（旧統一教会）の信者が、ジャーナリストの鈴木エイトさんに名誉を毀損されたとして損害賠償を求めた訴訟で、信者側の上告を退ける決定をした。15日付。鈴木さんに11万円の支払いを命じた一審判決を取り消し、信者側の請求を棄却した二審東京高裁判決が確定...

item.title: Marvel Comics is moving from NYC to Burbank, CA, the headqua…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Marvel Comics is moving from NYC to Burbank, CA, the headquarters of Marvel Studios, and asks 100+ NY-based employees to move to California by July 2027 (Borys Kit/The Hollywood Reporter)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Marvel Comics is moving from NYC to Burbank, CA, the headquarters of Marvel Studios, and asks 100+ NY-based employees to move to California by July 2027 (Borys Kit/The Hollywood Reporter)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: The Trump administration replaces a slavery exhibit at Presi…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The Trump administration replaces a slavery exhibit at President George Washington's Philadelphia home, drawing criticism from historians who say the new display whitewashes U.S. history.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration replaces a slavery exhibit at President George Washington's Philadelphia home, drawing criticism from historians who say the new display whitewashes U.S. history.

item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
How Paul Dacre broke new ground to sell readers an angry perspective at the Daily Mail and helped radicalize the UK's rightwing press, now run by his disciples (Andy Beckett/The Guardian)

item.title: The Trump administration is scrapping a policy that has allo…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
The Trump administration is scrapping a policy that has allowed international students and exchange visitors to remain in the US for as long as their studies last, replacing it with a four-year limit. Read more: bloom.bg/4fib1sh

📷: Sophie Park/Bloomberg
item.content:encoded:
The Trump administration is scrapping a policy that has allowed international students and exchange visitors to remain in the US for as long as their studies last, replacing it with a four-year limit. Read more: bloom.bg/4fib1sh

📷: Sophie Park/Bloomberg

item.title: Wildfire smoke can be seen via satellites from the Upper Mid…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Wildfire smoke can be seen via satellites from the Upper Midwest and Canada, across the Great Lakes and down to New York City. A heat dome is pushing temperatures close to 100 degrees across much of eastern Canada and has prompted alerts about poor air quality. nyti.ms/3RHmZnk
item.content:encoded: Wildfire smoke can be seen via satellites from the Upper Midwest and Canada, across the Great Lakes and down to New York City. A heat dome is pushing temperatures close to 100 degrees across much of eastern Canada and has prompted alerts about poor air quality. nyti.ms/3RHmZnk

item.title: If your freshly washed clothes still kind of stink, don’t re…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: If your freshly washed clothes still kind of stink, don’t resign yourself to smelling like an armpit. These tweaks to your laundry routine will help. nyti.ms/4aLQn2m
item.content:encoded: If your freshly washed clothes still kind of stink, don’t resign yourself to smelling like an armpit. These tweaks to your laundry routine will help. nyti.ms/4aLQn2m

item.title: More than 500 people are feared dead after reports that two …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: More than 500 people are feared dead after reports that two boats carrying members of Myanmar’s persecuted Rohingya minority have capsized in the Bay of Bengal, officials say.
item.content:encoded: More than 500 people are feared dead after reports that two boats carrying members of Myanmar’s persecuted Rohingya minority have capsized in the Bay of Bengal, officials say.

item.title: Nigerian stocks have posted the world's top returns this yea…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
Nigerian stocks have posted the world's top returns this year, vaulting past Korea's Kospi. Where are the opportunities for investors in African markets?

🎧 Tune in on July 17 at 8am ET: bloom.bg/3TkPDuY
item.content:encoded:
Nigerian stocks have posted the world's top returns this year, vaulting past Korea's Kospi. Where are the opportunities for investors in African markets?

🎧 Tune in on July 17 at 8am ET: bloom.bg/3TkPDuY

item.title: #🔖おもしろ 「写真で一言 ボケて」が18年間にわたるサービスに幕…という衝撃に、18年分の「何回見ても笑ってしまう」…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖おもしろ
「写真で一言 ボケて」が18年間にわたるサービスに幕…という衝撃に、18年分の「何回見ても笑ってしまう」懐かしすぎる名作ボケが大量に集まる

ボケて(bokete)公式 @boketejp 「写真で一言 ボケて」は2026年9月30日をもってアプリのサービスを終了します。18年間、本当にありがとうございました。 詳細はボケてお知らせブログをご覧ください。 bokete-photo.blogspot.com/2026/07/arigat… 2026-07-15 17:01:38 ※アプリ終了とともにwebサイトでの新規のボケ投稿・評...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖おもしろ
「写真で一言 ボケて」が18年間にわたるサービスに幕…という衝撃に、18年分の「何回見ても笑ってしまう」懐かしすぎる名作ボケが大量に集まる

ボケて(bokete)公式 @boketejp 「写真で一言 ボケて」は2026年9月30日をもってアプリのサービスを終了します。18年間、本当にありがとうございました。 詳細はボケてお知らせブログをご覧ください。 bokete-photo.blogspot.com/2026/07/arigat… 2026-07-15 17:01:38 ※アプリ終了とともにwebサイトでの新規のボケ投稿・評...

item.title: How Uber, Delivery Hero and rivals stack up in global food d…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: How Uber, Delivery Hero and rivals stack up in global food delivery reut.rs/4pph1DX
item.content:encoded: How Uber, Delivery Hero and rivals stack up in global food delivery reut.rs/4pph1DX

item.title: In Opinion By refusing accountability for the mistaken mis…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In Opinion

By refusing accountability for the mistaken missile strike on an Iranian elementary school, President Trump “is hurting the nation’s integrity and generating speculation among humanitarian groups as to whether this unintentional catastrophe amounts to a war crime,” W.J. Hennigan writes.
item.content:encoded:
In Opinion

By refusing accountability for the mistaken missile strike on an Iranian elementary school, President Trump “is hurting the nation’s integrity and generating speculation among humanitarian groups as to whether this unintentional catastrophe amounts to a war crime,” W.J. Hennigan writes.

item.title: Danny Boyle's Rupert Murdoch drama to open 2026 Venice Film …

item.description: Danny Boyle's Rupert Murdoch drama to open 2026 Venice Film Festival reut.rs/4fl4xsq
item.content:encoded: Danny Boyle's Rupert Murdoch drama to open 2026 Venice Film Festival reut.rs/4fl4xsq

item.title: Members of Congress are denouncing conditions at Delaney Hal…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Members of Congress are denouncing conditions at Delaney Hall, an immigration detention center in New Jersey that has been a flashpoint in President Trump’s expanding deportation campaign, calling for an overhaul of the facility.
item.content:encoded: Members of Congress are denouncing conditions at Delaney Hall, an immigration detention center in New Jersey that has been a flashpoint in President Trump’s expanding deportation campaign, calling for an overhaul of the facility.

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 「戦争責任と戦後責任の告白に立ち、天皇制の終焉を求めます ―皇室典範改正法の衆議院通過にあたって―」を…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖政治と経済
「戦争責任と戦後責任の告白に立ち、天皇制の終焉を求めます ―皇室典範改正法の衆議院通過にあたって―」を発表しました - NCC 日本キリスト教協議会

ホーム NEWS お知らせ 要請・声明 「戦争責任と戦後責任の告白に立ち、天皇制の終焉を求めます ―皇室典範改正法の衆議院通過にあたって―」を発表しました 7月10日、皇室典範改正案が衆議院本会議で与野党の賛成多数により可決され、衆議院を通過しました。この時にあたり、私たちは日本キリスト教協議会の歴史に立ち返り...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖政治と経済
「戦争責任と戦後責任の告白に立ち、天皇制の終焉を求めます ―皇室典範改正法の衆議院通過にあたって―」を発表しました - NCC 日本キリスト教協議会

ホーム NEWS お知らせ 要請・声明 「戦争責任と戦後責任の告白に立ち、天皇制の終焉を求めます ―皇室典範改正法の衆議院通過にあたって―」を発表しました 7月10日、皇室典範改正案が衆議院本会議で与野党の賛成多数により可決され、衆議院を通過しました。この時にあたり、私たちは日本キリスト教協議会の歴史に立ち返り...

item.title: More than 50 years ago, President Richard Nixon pitched a ye…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: More than 50 years ago, President Richard Nixon pitched a year-round extension of daylight saving time. Instead, his 1970s experiment unleashed wide-ranging problems he didn’t anticipate.
item.content:encoded: More than 50 years ago, President Richard Nixon pitched a year-round extension of daylight saving time. Instead, his 1970s experiment unleashed wide-ranging problems he didn’t anticipate.

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: England's defeat to Argenti…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: England's defeat to Argentina was a proactive disaster, a self-inflicted collapse, our columnist writes. "Tuchel made a tactical alteration that will go down as one of the most consequential mistakes ever by an England manager."
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: England's defeat to Argentina was a proactive disaster, a self-inflicted collapse, our columnist writes. "Tuchel made a tactical alteration that will go down as one of the most consequential mistakes ever by an England manager."

item.title: #🔖暮らし noteの企業戦略2026骨子｜深津 貴之 (fladdict) オープン社内報です。先日づけでCXO→…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖暮らし
noteの企業戦略2026骨子｜深津 貴之 (fladdict)

オープン社内報です。先日づけでCXO→CSO（最高戦略責任者）になりました。実態としてここ数年は戦略メインでやっていたため、それにあわせてのタイトル変更です。 そんなわけで、パブリックにできる範囲での、noteの基本戦略を再編集してみました。 noteのストラテジー戦略を一言で創作が生まれ、届き、報われ、また次の...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖暮らし
noteの企業戦略2026骨子｜深津 貴之 (fladdict)

オープン社内報です。先日づけでCXO→CSO（最高戦略責任者）になりました。実態としてここ数年は戦略メインでやっていたため、それにあわせてのタイトル変更です。 そんなわけで、パブリックにできる範囲での、noteの基本戦略を再編集してみました。 noteのストラテジー戦略を一言で創作が生まれ、届き、報われ、また次の...

item.title: #🔖エンタメ MyGO!!!!! 青木陽菜×林鼓子、音楽で誰もひとりにしない3rd Album『致並跡』【インタビュー…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖エンタメ
MyGO!!!!! 青木陽菜×林鼓子、音楽で誰もひとりにしない3rd Album『致並跡』【インタビュー】 | アニメイトタイムズ

MyGO!!!!!は音楽を通して、誰のこともひとりにしない――青木陽菜さん×林鼓子さんが迷いながら歩んできた“跡”の証。3rd Album『致並跡』ロングインタビュー MyGO!!!!!の3rd Album『致並跡』（読み：ちへいせん）がリリースされる。1st Album『迷跡波』、2nd Album『跡暖空』に続き、タイトルに“跡”の字を冠した本作には、...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖エンタメ
MyGO!!!!! 青木陽菜×林鼓子、音楽で誰もひとりにしない3rd Album『致並跡』【インタビュー】 | アニメイトタイムズ

MyGO!!!!!は音楽を通して、誰のこともひとりにしない――青木陽菜さん×林鼓子さんが迷いながら歩んできた“跡”の証。3rd Album『致並跡』ロングインタビュー MyGO!!!!!の3rd Album『致並跡』（読み：ちへいせん）がリリースされる。1st Album『迷跡波』、2nd Album『跡暖空』に続き、タイトルに“跡”の字を冠した本作には、...

item.title: Breaking News: An Italian former highway executive was sente…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: An Italian former highway executive was sentenced to 12 years in prison over a 2018 bridge collapse that killed 43 people.
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: An Italian former highway executive was sentenced to 12 years in prison over a 2018 bridge collapse that killed 43 people.

item.title: Exclusive: Iran asked Yemen’s Houthi movement to stand ready…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Exclusive: Iran asked Yemen’s Houthi movement to stand ready to close the Red Sea oil route if the United States strikes Iranian power infrastructure, three sources told Reuters, posing a potent new threat to global energy supplies reut.rs/4vveo4X
item.content:encoded: Exclusive: Iran asked Yemen’s Houthi movement to stand ready to close the Red Sea oil route if the United States strikes Iranian power infrastructure, three sources told Reuters, posing a potent new threat to global energy supplies reut.rs/4vveo4X
